  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Změnit objednávku žádosti"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications/{uuid}/order"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Vyžaduje oprávnění <b>applications.order.edit</b> pro autentizovaného uživatele

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["order"],"properties":{"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"Adresy. Povoleny jsou pouze typy `BILLING` a `DELIVERY`.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"typ adresy. V každém kontextu jsou povoleny pouze některé typy.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"jméno na adrese"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"ulice/městská část"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"číslo ulice"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"poštovní směrovací číslo"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"deliveryCarrier":{"type":"object","properties":{"carrierCustom":{"type":"string","description":"pro dopravce, kteří nebyli nalezeni ve výčtu ID zákazníka, zadejte hodnotu jako text"},"carrierId":{"type":"string","enum":["CZ_POST_HAND","CZ_POST_OFFICE","CZ_POST_OTHER","PPL","DPD","GEIS","IN_TIME","TOP_TRANS","GEBRUDER_WEISS","LOCAL_COURIER","TNT","GLS","HDS_COMFORT","HDS_STANDARD"]}},"title":"FinancováníV1DodáníPřepravce"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"typ doručení, pro typ `DELIVERY_CARRIER` lze dále specifikovat atributem DeliveryCarrier.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"documents":{"type":"array","description":"přiložené dokumenty (faktury atd.)","items":{"type":"object","required":["file","type"],"properties":{"description":{"type":"string","description":"Popis souboru"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"variabilní symbol (interní pro e-shop)"}},"title":"FinancingV1DocumentExtraData"},"file":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"Obsah souboru (zakódováno Base64, maximální velikost zakódovaného řetězce je 500 kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"název souboru"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"Adresa URL souboru"}},"title":"FinancováníFile"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Typ dokumentu","enum":["INVOICE","PROFORMA_INVOICE","CREDIT_NOTE","OTHER"]}},"title":"FinancingV1Document"}},"items":{"type":"array","description":"objednat položky","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"interní kód položky (interní pro e-shop). Slouží k lepší identifikaci položky pro budoucí změny","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN kód","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"Obsah souboru (zakódováno Base64, maximální velikost zakódovaného řetězce je 500 kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"název souboru"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"Adresa URL souboru"}},"title":"FinancováníFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"název položky"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Množství položky"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Částka v desetinném formátu"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Měna částky. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"typ položky","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Částka v desetinném formátu"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Měna částky. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestOrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"číslo objednávky (interní pro e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Datum a čas do objednání je rezervován. Po tomto datu e-shop negarantuje dostupnost zboží (pokud je zpracování žádosti delší, může to ohrozit vyřízení objednávky)."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Částka v desetinném formátu"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Měna částky. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variabilní symboly (interní pro e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderChange"},"reason":{"type":"string","description":"Důvod změny"}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderChangeRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["applicationInfo","items","number","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"applicationInfo":{"type":"object","required":["id","state"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Jedinečný identifikátor v HCO"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Stav aplikace.","enum":["CANCELLED","PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED"]},"stateReason":{"type":"string","description":"Popisuje vnitřní stav aplikace, např. když je stav PROCESSING - důvod, proč aplikace zůstává ve stavu zpracování","enum":["CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED","CANCELLED_TO_RETURN","PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_NEW","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_SIGNED","PROCESSING_VALIDATION_IN_PROGRESS","PROCESSING_VERIFICATION","READY_DELIVERED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_PAID","READY_SHIPPED","READY_TO_SHIP","REJECTED"]}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationBase"},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"datum a čas doručení"},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"sledovací číslo dodávky"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"typ doručení, pro typ `DELIVERY_CARRIER` lze dále specifikovat atributem DeliveryCarrier.Typ doruceni.
